description_long: This object consists of a group of three rustic wooden buildings, each with a weathered facade and black gabled or flat roofs, evoking the look of an Old West town. The central building features a prominent overhanging porch with a wooden awning, while the adjacent structures have similar porches and simple rectangular windows. To the left, a tall, metallic windmill with a rotating vane stands beside the buildings, and a wooden signpost is visible on the right. The exteriors are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the porches are supported by wooden posts. The overall appearance suggests a historical or themed residential area, possibly used for housing or small businesses in a frontier setting.
description: A group of three weathered wooden houses with porches, black roofs, and a tall windmill, resembling an Old West town.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wooden buildings with porches, the windmill on the left, and a signpost on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the buildings, the windmill's structure, and the simple window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden backs of the buildings and the tops of the roofs, with the windmill and signpost visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the windmill's profile and the side walls of the buildings with minimal window detail.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden doors with covered porches, supported by posts and simple overhangs, no decorative elements.
